panels.framing: splash establishing — wide of the Victorian library, Beatrix on a sliding wooden ladder mid-shelf reaching to reshelve a leather-bound book, towering bookshelves on both sides, stained-glass arched windows casting amber afternoon light beams with floating dust motes, brass reading lamps glowing soft green, long oak reading table in the foreground with scattered open books.
panels.pose: standing on the ladder, body in profile, one hand sliding a book back into a shelf, the other gripping the ladder rail, head turned slightly toward a separate book glowing faintly on a lower shelf
panels.expression: focused, scholarly, faintly puzzled — eyebrows up slightly
panels.wardrobe_state: cream high-collared blouse buttoned to the throat, long charcoal pencil skirt to ankle, low brown heels, brass watch-on-chain at the lapel, hair in a tight low bun at the nape, round wire-rim glasses on her face
panels.props_in_frame: ladder, bookshelves, faint glowing tome on a lower shelf, oak table, brass lamps, dust motes in light beams

panels.framing: MCU on Beatrix's hands and the tome — she has lifted the ancient leather-bound book from the shelf, an embossed glowing rune on its cover casting warm gold-amber light up onto her cream blouse and face, the rune's light catching in her round glasses
panels.pose: both hands holding the book at chest height, fingers spread on the leather cover, head bent slightly to read the rune
panels.expression: scholarly curiosity, eyebrows raised, lips parted slightly in recognition of Latin script
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse and lapel watch visible, hair still in tight bun
panels.props_in_frame: ancient leather tome with glowing amber rune on cover, faint dust on the leather, glow reflecting in her glasses

panels.framing: ECU on Beatrix's face — round wire-rim glasses catching the amber glow from the rune below frame, freckles across her cheekbones, green eyes wide with the first stirring of awareness, a tiny amber sparkle in each pupil
panels.pose: head tilted down toward the book just out of frame, eyes intent
panels.expression: first stirrings — a startled scholarly intake, lips just parted
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse collar visible at base of frame, glasses front-and-center, bun visible at the top of frame
panels.props_in_frame: amber rune glow reflecting on her face from below

panels.framing: MCU on Beatrix's upper body — the cream blouse just beginning to feel snug at the deltoids and chest, the brass watch-on-chain still hanging, her hands now resting on the open tome on the oak table, golden-amber light pulsing up from the pages, eyes thoughtful and analytical behind her glasses
panels.pose: standing now at the reading table, hands flat on the open pages, leaning forward slightly to read
panels.expression: analytical fascination — head tilted, eyebrows knit in study, a faint smile of intellectual recognition
panels.wardrobe_state: cream blouse with first visible strain across the deltoids and chest, top button still buttoned, watch-chain still visible, hair in bun with one or two wisps escaping at the temples
panels.props_in_frame: open glowing tome, oak table edge, amber light pulsing from pages
panels.dialogue_caption: Curious... the muscle fibers are densifying at an accelerated rate.

panels.framing: region ECU on the right shoulder and deltoid — the cream blouse fabric pulled taut over a now-thickened deltoid, the first split appearing at the seam, freckled fair skin visible through the small tear, golden-amber rune light still pulsing in from off-frame
panels.wardrobe_state: cream blouse straining, first seam split at right deltoid, coverage of body still maintained off-frame
panels.props_in_frame: fabric fibers stretching, faint amber light bath

panels.framing: full body of Beatrix at the reading table — cream blouse now visibly strained across a broader frame, hair bun fully loosened (now half-down with auburn locks flowing past her shoulders, a few hair pins on the table), the brass watch-on-chain still hanging, freckled skin glowing faintly in the amber rune light, pencil skirt taut over thickening quads
panels.pose: standing tall, both hands lifted from the open tome and held in front of her examining her own forearms, body angled three-quarter to camera
panels.expression: fascinated study of her own form, eyebrows raised, lips slightly parted, glasses still perfectly in place
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse straining with one seam slightly popped at right deltoid, top button intact, hair fully down past shoulders, glasses in place, pencil skirt taut, low heels
panels.props_in_frame: open tome on table glowing amber, hair pins on the table, brass lamp behind

panels.framing: MCU on Beatrix's face and upper chest — auburn copper hair now flowing loose past shoulders, round wire-rim glasses on her face, freckled cheeks slightly flushed from the energy, green eyes intent and intelligent, blouse top button still intact but second button feeling the strain across a fuller chest, brass watch-on-chain catching amber light
panels.pose: head tilted slightly down and forward toward the tome below frame, glasses pushed up the bridge of her nose by one finger, the other hand resting at her own collarbone in self-examination
panels.expression: dawning understanding, eyes intelligent and curious, half-smile of recognition
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse straining at the chest, hair flowing down past shoulders, glasses pushed up bridge of nose, freckles visible, brass watch visible
panels.props_in_frame: amber glow at base of frame from the tome, blurred bookshelves BG
panels.dialogue_caption: The Latin inscription said 'strength of body and mind together.' I begin to understand.

panels.framing: region ECU on Beatrix's upper torso — the cream blouse top button popped open showing a bit of collarbone and a hint of cleavage (still fully covered), the right shoulder seam now fully split open at the deltoid with thick muscle pushing through the tear, brass watch-on-chain still hanging across the chest, hair flowing freely in frame edge, glasses visible at top of frame
panels.pose: torso shot, one hand at the side of the neck, the other at the lapel
panels.expression: not centered — chin and lower face only — small confident smile
panels.mood: the body has changed substantially now
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse top button popped, second button straining, right deltoid seam fully torn, hair flowing freely, glasses still on, brass watch still on chain
panels.props_in_frame: amber light from below, glasses frame at top

panels.framing: full body of tier-5 Beatrix standing tall at the reading table — auburn copper hair flowing past shoulders, round wire-rim glasses, freckled fair skin, cream blouse with top button popped + right deltoid split + second button straining, charcoal pencil skirt with the front slit widened from her quad flex, low brown heels, brass watch-on-chain. Per the tier-5 lineup ref proportions.
panels.pose: three-quarter body angled to camera, one hand on the open tome on the table, the other resting at her hip, head turned to camera with intelligent confidence
panels.expression: confident scholarly satisfaction, eyebrows level, small confident smile, glasses up
panels.mood: she has understood and the body matches the mind now
panels.wardrobe_state: blouse top button popped, right deltoid seam split, second button strained but intact, hair down, glasses on, brass watch on chain, pencil skirt slit revealing flexed quad, low brown heels
panels.props_in_frame: open glowing tome on oak table, brass reading lamp, stained-glass window light beams behind, bookshelves BG

panels.framing: HERO SPLASH — full body of tier-5 Beatrix in the library, three-quarter hero stance, the open glowing tome on the oak table foreground, amber afternoon light beams streaming through stained-glass windows behind her, hair flowing past shoulders, glasses catching warm light, blouse strained + skirt slit revealing flexed quad, brass watch hanging. Dramatic glamour-photoreal CGI composition.
panels.pose: hero stance — body angled three-quarter to camera, one hand resting flat on the open tome, the other hand at hip, head turned to camera, chin slightly lifted, intelligent confident expression
panels.expression: quietly triumphant, satisfied, regal scholarly confidence — beautiful English-rose face with freckles and intelligent green eyes
panels.wardrobe_state: tier-5 wardrobe state — blouse strained with top button popped + right deltoid seam split, pencil skirt slit revealing flexed quad, low brown heels, hair flowing down past shoulders, glasses on, brass watch on chain
panels.props_in_frame: glowing tome, oak table, stained-glass window light beams, bookshelves, brass reading lamp
